ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market data is denominated */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker symbol */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol (e.g., BANKNIFTY04JUN2018700CE.NFO) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the ticker is listed */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security (e.g., Bank Nifty Jun 04 2018 700 CE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last trading date for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status (e.g., normal, halted, suspended) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Buy or sell indicator (e.g., 'B' or 'S') */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order ID linked to the trade */,
  "execution_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, canceled, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser/device */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol related to the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the news on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol related to the market trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., 'up', 'down', 'neutral') */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., algorithm, analyst) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)
